lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to verify cargo capacity, laden jump range, and the trade fit.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner cross-checked for the loadout's slot sizing and engineered stats.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Federal Corvette ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, cargo-rack sizes, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Federal Corvette
sources.what: Ship overview: internals layout, optional-internal sizes, hull price, and the Federal rank requirement.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Federal Corvette lore, Core Dynamics manufacturer, and design notes.
